posts.cooked:
You can download it from here: LBA 2 Russian Speech Pack.
File size: 64.41 MB.
NOTE: It just contains the .VOXes, and not the VIDEO.HQR as well. To use it, just change your spoken language to English and then install this speech pack.

And the Russian texts are here: LBA 2 Russian Texts.
File size: 510.1 kB.

To download, just left-click on the link, and on that site, click on the big yellow image. You know, the one which says SKACHAT = DOWNLOAD.

NOTE: The site the links link to is completely legal, since it does NOT offer WareZ stuff.

Enjoy.
How Can I make a speech pack?Its a big way isnt it?

Only recording everything will take ages

this russian lba rules !!!
cant wait to hear twinsen in other languages !!!
still looking for japanese

posts.name: Rose Immortal
posts.cooked:
Now, I have a question. I was given LBA 2 as a gift, and it came with Russian text and speech, including Russian text in the install. What will it take me to switch the program into English, or is it impossible since it came that way? I will settle with just switching the text into English, or just the voicesI dont have to have both even though it would be nice.

And once I do it, does that mean I cant put the Russian back?

Twinsens voice in the Russian version is SO wildly different from the English one! He sounds a little less cartoony and a little more, Im gonna kick your butt.

Since the Russian language isnt a official LBA language (the LBA engine doesnt handle that), if Im not wrong, the English version was replaced by the Russian one. Was the Russian version release as original? Is the original version you wanna give?
The thing you could do is, replace the TEXT.HQR file of the European release (I can send it to you if you want) when you install it and the game will appear in english. If you wanna the Voices, well it will be more difficult because the space, but I could get a space the way you could download it.

Btw, welcome to the forum and hope you like your stay

Im now uploading the voice files for you. You can now get the TEXT.HQR file from here: http://rapidshare.de/files/28080460/TEXT.HQR.html
